milestone.title: Decision-seam reports — decisive facts first, engine-sourced
milestone.goal: A reviewer at any decision seam (contract approval · verify gate · milestone-done) gets the decisive facts first from one rendered, engine-sourced report — instead of digging through chat prose or a 250-line phase dump.
